verses.arabicText: وَقَالُوا۟ مَا لَنَا لَا نَرَىٰ رِجَالًۭا كُنَّا نَعُدُّهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَشْرَارِ
verses.translationText: And they will say, "Why do we not see men whom we used to count among the worst?

verses.arabicText: أَتَّخَذْنَٰهُمْ سِخْرِيًّا أَمْ زَاغَتْ عَنْهُمُ ٱلْأَبْصَٰرُ
verses.translationText: Is it [because] we took them in ridicule, or has [our] vision turned away from them?"

verses.arabicText: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقٌّۭ تَخَاصُمُ أَهْلِ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.translationText: Indeed, that is truth - the quarreling of the people of the Fire.

verses.arabicText: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مُنذِرٌۭ ۖ وَمَا مِنْ إِلَٰهٍ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ٱلْوَٰحِدُ ٱلْقَهَّارُ
verses.translationText: Say, [O Muhammad], "I am only a warner, and there is not any deity except Allah, the One, the Prevailing.

verses.arabicText: رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفَّٰرُ
verses.translationText: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver."

verses.arabicText: قُلْ هُوَ نَبَؤٌا۟ عَظِيمٌ
verses.translationText: Say, "It is great news

verses.arabicText: أَنتُمْ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضُونَ
verses.translationText: From which you turn away.

verses.arabicText: مَا كَانَ لِىَ مِنْ عِلْمٍۭ بِٱلْمَلَإِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰٓ إِذْ يَخْتَصِمُونَ
verses.translationText: I had no knowledge of the exalted assembly [of angels] when they were disputing [the creation of Adam].

verses.arabicText: إِن يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ إِلَّآ أَنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٌۭ مُّبِينٌ
verses.translationText: It has not been revealed to me except that I am a clear warner."

verses.arabicText: إِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خَٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًۭا مِّن طِينٍۢ
verses.translationText: [So mention] when your Lord said to the angels, "Indeed, I am going to create a human being from clay.

verses.arabicText: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سَٰجِدِينَ
verses.translationText: So when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration."

verses.arabicText: فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
verses.translationText: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely.

verses.arabicText: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ ٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.translationText: Except Iblees; he was arrogant and became among the disbelievers.

verses.arabicText: قَالَ يَٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسْجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَىَّ ۖ أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْعَالِينَ
verses.translationText: [Allah] said, "O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant [then], or were you [already] among the haughty?"

verses.arabicText: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْهُ ۖ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍۢ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍۢ
verses.translationText: He said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌۭ
verses.translationText: [Allah] said, "Then get out of Paradise, for indeed, you are expelled.

verses.arabicText: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ لَعْنَتِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.translationText: And indeed, upon you is My curse until the Day of Recompense."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
verses.translationText: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ
verses.translationText: [Allah] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved

verses.arabicText: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْوَقْتِ ٱلْمَعْلُومِ
verses.translationText: Until the Day of the time well-known."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ فَبِعِزَّتِكَ لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.translationText: [Iblees] said, "By your might, I will surely mislead them all

verses.arabicText: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.translationText: Except, among them, Your chosen servants."
